user_system_path: M1 backend-lock: make workday_presence_state always-present on dashboard load so the owner path surfaces a real Right Now state/card instead of a dead setup form.
allowed_files_raw: workday-presence GET endpoint to generate default state; tests for the new behavior; seam state files
forbidden_files_raw: No UI changes, no dashboard changes, no auth/stripe work, no schema migrations.
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npm run lint && npm run build && npm test
required_browser_proof: Manual: load dashboard and verify a real Right Now card appears instead of setup form on first load
acceptance_condition: Dashboard always shows a real Right Now state on load: workday_presence_state present and card.mode is 'active' instead of 'setup' when no saved state exists.
stop_condition: Stop when dashboard shows real Right Now card on fresh load, tests pass, CI green, and seam state files agree on active_issue #296.
next_command: Manual browser verification: load dashboard and confirm Right Now card surfaces without user input
